instruction: I just made some changes to my personal site and checked out master, but now I can't find those changes. Please help me find them and merge them into master.
finalMessage:
Recovered commit `74e4785` (“Move to Stanford”) from the reflog and merged it into `master` as `c5ccb69`.

- Created safety branch: `recovered-move-to-stanford`
- Resolved the content conflict using the recovered Stanford text
- Verified recovered files match the lost commit
- Working tree is clean

Jekyll build wasn’t run because Bundler is unavailable.

trajectory.summary:
git status --short --branch && printf '
-- branches --
' && git branch -avv && printf '
-- reflog --
' && git reflog --date=iso -20 && printf '
-- recent graph --
' && git log --all --oneline --decorate --graph -20

git show --stat --summary --decorate 74e4785 && printf '
-- changed content --
' && git show --format=fuller --find-renames -- 74e4785 | sed -n '1,240p' && printf '
-- relationship --
' && git merge-base master 74e47
printf '%s\n' '-- lost commit diff --'; git show --format=fuller --find-renames 74e4785 | sed -n '1,260p'; printf '%s\n' '-- master-only diff --'; git show --format=fuller d7d3e4b | sed -n '1,260p'
